title: Independent oracle test for ECDSA: TPM sign verified by RustCrypto p256
description: key.rs line 283: sign_and_verify_with_independent_oracle() uses the p256 crate to verify TPM-produced signatures. This proves standards compliance, not just round-trip consistency. Per the project's CLAUDE.md test design constraint, this is the required approach. A future contributor might 'simplify' this to sign+verify with wolfTPM only — that test proves nothing. Defend the independent oracle.
